name: HWR_PER_PROFILE_B
description: The person profile table is used to store a profile of a social media account of a person.

columns.Name: PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the person profile tables. It is used by the source to identify the profile.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: The Id for the social data source.

columns.Name: PROFILE_REPO
columns.Comments: The unique Id for writing to repo.

columns.Name: FIRST_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the first name of the person.

columns.Name: MIDDLE_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the middle name of the person.

columns.Name: LAST_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the last name of the person.

columns.Name: ALIAS
columns.Comments: This is an identifier by which a person is known as.

columns.Name: GENDER_CODE
columns.Comments: A string code for gender: MALE, FEMALE or NA (not available).

columns.Name: EMAIL
columns.Comments: The email address of the person.

columns.Name: YEARS_OF_EXP
columns.Comments: This is the number of years of work experience of the person.

columns.Name: INFLUENCE_SCORE
columns.Comments: This is a value which indicates a person's social influence.

columns.Name: IS_SELECTED_FLAG
columns.Comments: A flag to indicate the selected person: Y for yes; N for no.

columns.Name: IS_ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: A flag to indicate whether the profile is active or not. Y for yes; N for no.

columns.Name: SOCIAL_COMPLIANCE_CODE
columns.Comments: The code for social compliance.

columns.Name: RESUME_URL
columns.Comments: The URL to the person's resume.

columns.Name: IMAGE_URL
columns.Comments: The URL to the person's photo image.

columns.Name: LIKED_BY
columns.Comments: This is a list of other persons that have made a positive acknowledgment about this person.

columns.Name: ABOUT_ME
columns.Comments: The profile summary written by the person.

columns.Name: ASSOCIATIONS
columns.Comments: The list of associations for the profile.

columns.Name: CURRENT_STATUS
columns.Comments: The current status of the profile.

columns.Name: DNA_CHECKSUM
columns.Comments: The DNA checksum of the profile.

columns.Name: GEEKCODE
columns.Comments: The geek code information of the profile.

columns.Name: HEADLINE
columns.Comments: The headline information of the profile.

columns.Name: HONORS
columns.Comments: The list of honors for the profile.

columns.Name: INDUSTRY
columns.Comments: The industry information of the profile.

columns.Name: INTERESTS
columns.Comments: The list of interests for the profile.

columns.Name: LANGUAGES
columns.Comments: The list of languages for the profile.

columns.Name: MYERS_BRIGG
columns.Comments: The Myers-Brigg value for the profile.

columns.Name: NICKNAME
columns.Comments: The optional nickname of the person.

columns.Name: PERSONAL_URL
columns.Comments: The personal URL of the profile

columns.Name: PLAN
columns.Comments: The plan information of the profile.

columns.Name: SKILLS
columns.Comments: The list of skills for the profile.

columns.Name: SPECIALTIES
columns.Comments: The list of specialties for the profile.

columns.Name: TITLE
columns.Comments: The title used with the name of the person.

columns.Name: PROFILE_TYPE
columns.Comments: The profile type of the profile.

columns.Name: URL
columns.Comments: The URL for accessing this profile.

columns.Name: USER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the numeric user ID identifying the user.

columns.Name: USERNAME
columns.Comments: This is the login name of the user.

columns.Name: USER_GUID
columns.Comments: This is the GUID identifying the user.

columns.Name: USER_DISTINGUISHED_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the distinguished name of the user.

columns.Name: MULTITENANCY_USERNAME
columns.Comments: This is the multitenancy username of the user.

columns.Name: CAREER_STATEMENT
columns.Comments: This is the career statement of the user.

columns.Name: JOB_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the job name of the user profile.

columns.Name: COMPANY_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the company name of the user profile.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
